title: Mooniac
description: texture pack that turns regular moon into sleeping cosmic creature...
body:
🌕 Mooniac is a texture pack that transform moon into cosmic creature... try not to wake it up

![Mooniac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa476102cd058393be27cff7dcdb63a5b73fe0dc.png)

🌌 far far away mooniac sleeps through eons... waiting...
# 

**changes:**
- all moon phases
